prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.5 kg; Height 172.2 cm; BMI 18.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.9%; 9 months ago 7.0%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 152mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.9kg; 9 months ago 55.9kg; 6 months ago 50.8kg; 3 months ago 50.3kg; current 55.5kg), Height (12 months ago 172.2cm; 9 months ago 172.2cm; 6 months ago 172.2cm; 3 months ago 172.2cm; current 172.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 17.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 17.0kg/m²; current 18.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 38U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 40U/L), AST (12 months ago 47U/L; 9 months ago 45U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 53U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; current 20mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 842mg/g; 9 months ago 838mg/g; 6 months ago 1002mg/g; 3 months ago 1403mg/g; current 997mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 178mg/dL; 6 months ago 183mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.88 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
